ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facility_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility category */,
  "tonnage_factor" TEXT /* Tonnage factor used in fee calculations */,
  "basic_permit_fee" TEXT /* Basic permit fee amount */,
  "nonattainment_fee" TEXT /* Nonattainment area added fee amount */,
  "complexity_fee_3_6" TEXT /* Complexity fee for facilities with 3-6 programs */,
  "complexity_fee_7_plus" TEXT /* Complexity fee for facilities with 7 or more programs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the facility category is active or not */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the facility category was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the facility category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility category */,
  "tonnage" TEXT /* Tonnage of the facility */,
  "is_nonattainment_area" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the facility is in a nonattainment area */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact person's email address */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was registered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the facility is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES facility_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permit application */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility submitting the application */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "submission_method" TEXT /* Method used to submit the application */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* Required documents for the permit application */,
  "application_status_history" TEXT /* History of status changes for the permit application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_applications_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permit_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permit application */,
  "basic_fee" TEXT /* Basic permit fee amount */,
  "nonattainment_fee" TEXT /* Nonattainment area added fee amount */,
  "complexity_fee" TEXT /* Complexity fee amount */,
  "total_fee" TEXT /* Total fee amount */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the permit fee payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the permit fee payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permit_fees_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES permit_applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., emission control, waste management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_programs" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "program_count" INTEGER /* Count of programs associated with the facility */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_records" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility making the payment */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permit application */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (e.g., routine, follow-up) */,
  "compliance_status_history" TEXT /* History of compliance status changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility operator, regulator) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, application submission) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
